Home / Lore / People / Andrew Ellis

person

Andrew Ellis

The former Speaker who becomes President during the crisis, is rescued from the True Sons and is later exposed as a Black Tusk collaborator.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Rescue and betrayal

Ellis first appears to be a rescue objective and source of the encryption key needed to reach the antiviral. His cooperation with Black Tusk turns that recovery into a betrayal and a later pursuit at Camp White Oak. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official story recap identifies Ellis as the former Speaker of the House and missing President held by the True Sons at Capitol Hill. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Ellis was working with Black Tusk, took the broad-spectrum antiviral and was later extracted by the faction from Camp White Oak. [1]

Related records

  • True Sonsheld by
  • Black Tuskallied with
  • Camp White Oakappears in

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Later seasonal developments involving Ellis are outside this first campaign-and-Episode-1 record.
